title: Bank Operations - Systems Project Manager/System Support Analyst
description:
Job Summary

The Business Supporting Officer/System Project Manager will drive system optimization and digital transformation initiatives within the bank’s operations. You will lead cross-functional projects to enhance system functionality, improve operational efficiency, and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.

Responsibilities

  • Lead and coordinate system enhancement projects by gathering requirements, conducting functional testing, and verifying business outcomes to ensure successful system upgrades
  • Represent the bank’s operational interests in industry work group meetings and follow up on action items to influence industry standards and practices
  • Drive digital transformation by supporting the implementation and localization of operational systems, enhancing departmental capabilities
  • Optimize system functionality and operational processes by identifying improvement opportunities, drafting operational manuals, and delivering internal training sessions to build team competency
  • Prepare, analyze, and submit accurate statistical, monitoring, and regulatory reports within established deadlines to support compliance and decision-making
  • Provide proactive daily business support by resolving operational issues and assisting with tasks assigned by the Department Head to maintain smooth operations
  • Maintain high standards of compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements to safeguard operational integrity

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Knowledge of local payment systems such as MEPS+, GIRO, FAST, PayNow, and eGIRO, demonstrated through participation in industry exercises
  • Familiarity with data analysis techniques and reporting tools to support data-driven decision-making
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) to produce professional documentation and presentations

postedCompany.description:
At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
postedCompany.name: GREENLANE PRIVATE LTD.
